summary: Single proposal ports E126's winning template to OI_Price channel using three supported, T0-safe fields; no integrity issues identified — caution on live-overlap with the existing OI_Price pump-long live strategy.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All three novel_dim fields are T0-observable: taker_buy_ratio_5m is a trailing 5m window ending at T0 (not forward-looking), liquidity_bucket is a static/slow classification, and oi_change_pct is a point-in-time delta. No forward_*, confirm_after_*, or post_event_* fields present. Minor caveat: ensure taker_buy_ratio_5m is implemented as the trailing [T0-5m, T0] window and not [T0, T0+5m] — naming is ambiguous but matches E126's convention which has been validated as T0-safe.
risk_assessments.multitest_inflation_notes: This is the 524th archetype in a registry of 523, with 61 already on OI_Price channel. Triple-AND on supported fields is structurally distinct, but the family-wise FDR across 20k results is non-trivial. Mitigated by Round 3 metrics (mean, kelly_capped, p25_capped_tail) that already penalize asymmetric TP/SL traps surfaced in R2. Acceptable with current metric stack.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: User runs 'BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long' live. This proposal is OI_Price + long + OI-burst + taker-buy-extreme — same channel, same side, similar trigger geometry. In paper-shadow mode this is a monitoring item, not a blocker; concurrent live deployment would risk position pile-on / effective leverage above intended sizing on the same symbol set.
risk_assessments.concentration_notes: liquidity_bucket=high restricts the universe to a small set of top-liquidity symbols (likely BTC/ETH/SOL-tier). Combined with oi_change_pct>=10 and taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.65, triggers will cluster on 1–3 symbols during correlated OI bursts. At 5–10% per trade on $1000 capital, 2–3 concurrent triggers within minutes is plausible — advisory only in paper-shadow.
risk_assessments.adversarial_notes: Anyone observing the BWE OI_Price stream could anticipate triggers, but $1000 capital makes front-running economically irrelevant. No mass-symbol manipulation enabler.
risk_assessments.remediation: Proceed to backtest. For paper-shadow monitoring: (1) tag results with overlap-flag against the live OI_Price pump-long strategy and report concurrent-trigger frequency, (2) verify taker_buy_ratio_5m is implemented as trailing window in the kernel before scoring, (3) report symbol-concentration (top-1 and top-3 symbol share of triggers) alongside the standard metric stack so single-symbol dependence is visible.
